title: Funtime 55914 Rainbow Rainmaker Toy,for 6 months to 3 years, 23cm
features: Suitable for age 6 months and upwards
Cascading coloured beads create a rain sound
description: Product Description This rainbow Rainmaker from Fun Time makes an ideal choice for your baby. It’s educational, sturdy and the fun and games never stop. The cascading coloured beads create a rain sound. Turn the Rainmaker over and watch the beads tumble. We can’t promise that the Fun Time range of toys will make your child a genius, but they will certainly stimulate their senses and help to develop their skills. There’s only one word for the rainbow Rainmaker and that word is “fun”. this product conforms to EN71 and the toy safety Directive. PLEASE remove all packaging before giving it to your child. This toy is suitable for age 6 months and upwards. Safety Warning Recommended age 6 months - 3 years Box Contains 1 x Rainbow Rainmaker See more
